name: General Practice
description: Primary care for general health concerns, preventive care, and routine check-ups.

name: Cardiology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of heart and cardiovascular system disorders.

name: Dermatology
description: Treatment of skin, hair, and nail conditions including acne, eczema, and skin cancer screening.

name: Orthopedics
description: Care for musculoskeletal system including bones, joints, ligaments, and muscles.

name: Pediatrics
description: Medical care for infants, children, and adolescents up to age 18.

name: Neurology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of nervous system disorders including brain, spinal cord, and nerve conditions.

name: Ophthalmology
description: Eye and vision care including diagnosis and treatment of eye diseases and surgical procedures.

name: Psychiatry
description: Mental health care including diagnosis and treatment of emotional and behavioral disorders.
